data.body:
Done — fork commit 1bad2a7 on navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template@main. SC6 evidence:
- (a) NOTICE documents derivation from navapbc/template-application-nextjs at pinned SHA a0ca4c91f3e1acb74d8801036b5c762fcb1c9615
- (b) Date of derivation: 2026-04-19
- (c) Modifications enumerated: copier render, nava-platform strip, {{PROJECT_NAME}} placeholders, DSO infrastructure addition, tickets orphan branch
- (d) Apache-2.0 §4 retention clause stated explicitly
- README's 'Provenance and license' section links to NOTICE
- LICENSE blob SHA matches upstream (d9a10c0d8e868ebf8da0b3dc95bb0be634c34bfe) — preserved unmodified
